info.title: MercadoZetta API
info.description: HTTP contract for the current white-label marketplace API.

parameters.name: X-Tenant-Id

value.error: Too big: expected number to be <=100
Product status filter must be draft, active, paused, sold_out, or archived

Product sort must be created_asc, created_desc, name_asc, or inventory_desc

LoginRequest.description: Credentials used to create a tenant-bound session.

AccountRequest.description: Email used for a non-enumerating account-security request.

PasswordResetConfirmation.description: Single-use reset token and matching replacement password.

PasswordChangeRequest.description: Current credential and matching replacement password.

EmailChangeRequest.description: Proposed login email and current credential.

AccountDeactivationRequest.description: Current credential and explicit deactivation confirmation.

CreateUserRequest.description: Details required to register a marketplace account.

CreateProductRequest.description: Details required to create a product listing.

message.const: If an eligible account exists, instructions will be sent.
If the address can be used, confirmation instructions will be sent.
